title: croton lepidus
intro: Croton lepidus, also known as the fire croton or fire bush, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of croton lepidus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant can be dried and made into tea, or the leaves can be crushed and applied topically to affected areas.
